title: Externalize scheduler.py constants to config
description: Replace module-level constants in scheduler.py (FOLLOWUP_SUFFIXES, CORRECTIVE_SUFFIX, MAX_CORRECTIVE_ATTEMPTS, TRANSIENT_BLOCK_PATTERNS, lease timeout timedelta, FOLLOWUP_AGENT_BY_SUFFIX, RUNNABLE_REASSIGN_AGENTS) with reads from self.config.scheduler and self.config.agent_types. Compute FOLLOWUP_AGENT_BY_SUFFIX from config in __init__ and store as instance attribute. Derive RUNNABLE_REASSIGN_AGENTS from self.config.agent_types. Remove the module-level constants once all references are replaced.
acceptance_criteria: All scheduler module-level constants for config-driven values are removed
self.config.scheduler fields used for followup_suffixes, corrective_suffix, max_corrective_attempts, transient_block_patterns, and lease_timeout_minutes
FOLLOWUP_AGENT_BY_SUFFIX computed from config in Scheduler.__init__
Changing config.yaml values changes scheduler behavior without code changes
Fallback defaults work when config.yaml is absent
